message:
feat(api): add WeztermInterface trait and generify PolicyGatedInjector

wezterm.rs:
- Add WeztermInterface trait abstracting all WezTerm CLI operations
  (list_panes, get_pane, get_text, send_text, spawn, split_pane, etc.)
- Define WeztermFuture<'a, T> type alias for boxed async returns
- Implement WeztermInterface for WeztermClient with all 15 methods

This enables mock implementations for simulation/testing without changing
call sites or importing the concrete client type.

policy.rs:
- Generify PolicyGatedInjector<C = WeztermClient> over C: WeztermInterface
- Update new(), with_storage(), and permissive() constructors
- Existing call sites using WeztermClient work unchanged via default param

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
